candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent-equity line is present.

Total liabilities plus equity, not book equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is visible, so total equity is used as the BE priority list. MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the provided Balance Sheet. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
